resumes.title: AI Internship Resume
resumes.summary: Focused on AI internships with full-stack product shipping evidence.
resumes.content:
P ROHITH

Github: https://github.com/Puttarohith

Linkedin: linkedin.com/in/rohith-putta-76b1b8245
Email: puttarohithcrazy@gmail.com

Phone: 9000060668

CAREER OBJECTIVE

To work as a Software Engineer where I can use my coding skills, learn new technologies, and contribute to the company’s growth.

EDUCATION

B.Tech – Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence ) 2023–2027
• VEMU Institute of Technology, Chittoor
• CGPA: 8.38

TECHNICAL SKILLS

• Programming: Python, C
• Databases: MySQL
• Tools: Git, VS Code
• Other: Problem solving, Debugging, Algorithms

PROJECTS

• AI-Based Crop & Fertilizer Recommendation Chatbot – A Python chatbot that recommends suitable crops, fertilizers, and next-crop rotation.
• Real-Time Emotion Detection System – A Python OpenCV tool that identifies emotions (Happy/Neutral) from live webcam feed using Haar cascade models.
• VISTRA: AI-based accident detection system using video and audio analysis with automatic drone-based emergency response.

CERTIFICATIONS

• Career Essentials in Generative AI — LinkedIn & Microsoft
• AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials - AWS
• Professional Diploma in Agile Product Management — MTF Institute (Udemy)

COMPETITIONS

• Finalist – Aarohan, IIT Bombay Techfest (Viksit Bharat 2047)
• Winner of Project Expo 2K26 at Vemu Institute of Technology for presenting an innovative engineering project

STRENGTHS

Strong problem-solving ability and good understanding of Python and AI basics.

HOBBIES

Working on Arduino projects, building drones, and exploring new technologies.

LANGUAGES

English | Telugu
improvements: Add measurable impact to every project bullet.
Align summary to the target internship theme.
Keep the strongest AI stack evidence above the fold.
